prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm lamplight, Yuna Ironleaf (feminine ranger, green half-cape, leaf brooch) and Yuna Starling (androgynous healer, cream and mint robes) working together. Yuna Ironleaf lifts a heavy, glowing iron ingot from a wooden workbench, while Yuna Starling reaches out to steady the metal with both hands, their expressions focused and cooperative. Cinematic anime style, consistent lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot in the forge, Yuna Starling carefully guides the heavy iron ingot onto the central anvil while Yuna Ironleaf adjusts her grip to stabilize it perfectly. They exchange a brief, appreciative nod as they prepare to work on the metal together. Consistent character appearance and camera angle, warm forge atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
